goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: Accessible-name compatibility: combine ordinal, ingredient-specific, and visible quantity label phrases; also proactively combine old/new confirmation button phrases. Preserve visible text and all behavior, avoiding another protected-oracle loop.

worker_package.objective: Change only two CookingMode aria-labels, then run focused/type/build, cooking/workflow E2Es, disposable DB, final integrity; retain exact-hash grocery/recipe passes.
verify: Require T097 hashes and two-attribute diff.
Run scoped format/lint, focused unit, typecheck, isolated build.
Run unchanged cooking and workflow E2Es independently.
Run disposable DB and final live PID/port/hash/diff/status integrity.
stop_if: Hashes differ or names omit visible/old/new phrases.
Any behavior/text/CSS/test change or E2E failure.

evidence: Workflow failure is only old quantity name.
New cooking locator uses ingredient name.
Next old/new confirmation names also differ.

parallel_safety.rationale: One naming contract and two serial oracles.
